title: ononis stenophylla
intro: Ononis stenophylla, also known as the slender restharrow, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the legume family. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic activities. Consuming the plant or its herbal preparations may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, and also has potential benefits for cardiovascular health and immune system function. Ononis stenophylla can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be obtained through drying, crushing, or distillation of the plant's leaves and roots.
